translation.literal_translation: But (it is) one whose opening is from light; for thus some recensions read. (9)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.9: the aja passage should be read in line with recensional evidence that begins from jyotis/tejas, supporting an elemental-cosmic sequence rather than Sankhya pradhana semantics.
translation.interpretive_note: Textual-variant support is used as a hermeneutic discriminator.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Literal preserves compact sutra structure and may be further polished for idiom.
Technical line assumes the recension note is text-critically accepted.
